title: geranium balsameum
intro: Geranium balsameum, also known as Mountain Geranium, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its pink to red flowers and a slightly bitter, astringent taste. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Geranium balsameum include its potential to help treat digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Geranium balsameum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
